content.en:
Ye Tian put these reincarnation sand springs around, soaked them in it and began to cultivate.

Rumble!!!

Strands of pure energy melted into Ye Tian's body, helping him refine his physical body.

"The effect is okay!" Ye Tian was surprised, "If there is enough reincarnation sand spring water, my physical strength will increase a lot!"

So, he plans to use the reincarnation sandworm to replicate the body to collect more reincarnation sand spring water.

The years passed.

Ye Tian refined a large amount of reincarnation sand spring water, and his replica body continued to steal the spring water from the reincarnation sand spring and continued to send it over.

In this way, Ye Tian has never lacked reincarnation sand spring water.

Of course.

This is also because there is too much water in the reincarnation sand spring, so that what his reincarnation sandworm does in his reincarnation sandworm body has not been discovered, or that no reincarnation sandworm cares.

Long years have passed.

Ye Tian's physical fitness has increased greatly, coupled with the fact that he has copied his body to absorb and refine a lot of treasures that have improved the origin of the other side, and his cultivation has also been greatly improved.

But this day.

The reincarnation sandworm copied its body and stole the water of the reincarnation sand spring.

Rumble!!!!

A reincarnation sandworm comparable to the top Origin Upper Realm directly suppressed Ye Tian's reincarnation sandworm copy body, kicked it out of the reincarnation sand spring, and did not allow him to cultivate here.

The fact that the replica body was not killed is already very merciful.

"It's a bit difficult to get in again, and even if you copy other reincarnation sandworms to copy your body, it's useless!"

Ye Tian pondered for a moment, thinking about how to get more reincarnation sand spring water.

"It seems that it can only cause the two reincarnation sand worm clans to break out into battle, and once they break out into battle, I can take the opportunity to steal a large amount of reincarnation sand spring water!"

He thought about it carefully, and this method was still feasible.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian copied a reincarnation sandworm from a nearby reincarnation sandworm group, and then kept creating contradictions.

He's like a-stirring stick, escalating the conflict between the two sides.

Finally, a war broke out between the two reincarnation sandworm tribes.

Rumble!!!!

A large number of reincarnation sandworms fought each other, and even the reincarnation sandworms of the top origin upper realm also attacked, and the war continued to escalate and turned into a full-scale war.

"Good chance!"

Ye Tian immediately infiltrated the reincarnation sand worm and frantically swallowed a large amount of reincarnation sand spring water.

Since there are no reincarnation sandworms here, it is natural that his behavior will not be discovered.

And.

He also continued to go deeper into the depths of the Samsara Sand Spring, where the Samsara Sand Spring water was of better quality and more effective.

So, he directly took the reincarnation sand spring water here.

However, the reincarnation sand spring water is too heavy, and it contains too much energy, and the copy body can't carry it.

After absorbing a large amount of reincarnation sand spring water, Ye Tian's replica body still chose to leave.

Afterwards.

He left here, away from the range of the battle.

Of course.

Soon, he copied another reincarnation sandworm to copy his body, and continued to collect reincarnation sand spring water.

In this way, countless reincarnation sand spring water was obtained by Ye Tian.

......

"Now there is no shortage of reincarnation sand spring water!"

Ye Tian soaked in the massive reincarnation sand spring water, absorbing energy and refining his physical body.

And.

He absorbs high-quality reincarnation sand spring water, and the quenching effect is better.

After a long time, Ye Tian's body has been tempered to an extremely high level, although the reincarnation sand spring water still has an effect on him, but the effect is not so good, it may take an endless long time to improve a little physical strength.

Then, it's not worth it to continue cultivating.

However, the remaining Samsara Sand Spring water can be brought back in the future.

The days that followed.

Ye Tian continued to search for treasures in the Endless Sand Sea as a reincarnation sand worm replica body, and the Endless Sand Sea still has a lot of good things in addition to the reincarnation sand spring and reincarnation sand gold.

this day.

Ye Tian was at the end of the endless sand sea and found an incomparably precious treasure - the reincarnation sand fruit.

This kind of treasure is extremely precious, and Ye Tian didn't know its value at first.

But when he ate a reincarnation sand fruit, he found that the effect of comprehending the origin rules of the other side had been greatly enhanced, and its value was even higher than that of the reincarnation heavenly liquid!

So, he began to look for the samsara sand fruit.

But reincarnation sand fruits are indeed rare and difficult to find.

However, after he subdued a batch of reincarnation sandworms, he asked these reincarnation sandworms to help him find them, which was much faster.

In this way, after a long time, Ye Tian found six reincarnation sand fruits.

With these six reincarnation sand fruits, Ye Tian was sure that he would be able to raise the Origin Rule of the Other Shore to the ninety-seven-level realm faster.

If he is promoted to the ninety percent seven realm, his strength will definitely be raised to the top Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor combat power, and when the time comes, with his strength, he will not even be afraid of the top reincarnation sandworm here.

Thereupon.

In the following days, Ye Tian used the reincarnation sand fruit and the reincarnation sand liquid to continuously comprehend the origin rules of the other side.

Before you know it, another hundred thousand primeval years have passed.

"The rules of the other side of the origin are about to be broken!"

Ye Tianming enlightened.

Sure enough, it didn't take long.

His other side origin rules broke the shackles and stepped into the realm of ninety percent and seven.

At the same time, his other side origin is also skyrocketing, rapidly improving.

At this moment, his strength has increased significantly.

In addition, the continuous refining of reincarnation sand spring water in the past long years has skyrocketed in physical fitness.

His current strength is far superior to that of the past, and he can be called invincible among the top Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

After his strength was greatly improved, he went directly to find trouble with the reincarnation sandworm and fought against the top Origin Upper Realm reincarnation sandworm.

Sure enough, not only did he not fall into disadvantage, but even had a slight advantage.

However, after the help of other reincarnation sandworms, he was defeated and then besieged.

Of course, he also killed a large number of reincarnation sandworms.

"I've been to many places in the Endless Sand Sea, and I've obtained a lot of reincarnation sand gold and various resources, now it's time to continue to go deeper!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He kept shuttling and weaving, and finally passed through the end of the endless sea of sand and came to an area of black mist.

However, just as he had just entered the black mist area, his body was directly shattered.

"This black fog ......"

Ye Tian frowned.

This black mist contains a terrifying power, and the reincarnation sandworms who have cultivated in the late stage of the Origin Upper Realm can't bear it, and they are directly killed in seconds.

Subsequently.

He experimented with his real body replication, but it only lasted for an instant, and he was also eroded by the black mist and shattered his body to death.
